About Me

My name is Josh Leon and I am from Payson, Utah. I am an undergraduate student at Utah Valley University studying Bioinformatics while also obtaining certificates in Data Analytics and Geographic Information Systems (GIS). When I’m not messing with code or making maps, I enjoy playing with my dog, spending time with my wife, supporting my football/fútbol teams, and gaming on the Switch.
